exercises.title: Interference Patterns
exercises.description: Demonstrate constructive and destructive interference with Hadamard gates.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]])/np.sqrt(2)
ket_0 = np.array([1, 0])
ket_1 = np.array([0, 1])

# Apply H twice to |0⟩
state = H @ H @ ket_0
print(f'HH|0⟩ = {state}')

# Apply H twice to |1⟩
state = H @ H @ ket_1
print(f'HH|1⟩ = {state}')
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]])/np.sqrt(2)
ket_0 = np.array([1, 0])
ket_1 = np.array([0, 1])

print('HH|0⟩ =', H @ H @ ket_0, '= |0⟩ (constructive at |0⟩)')
print('HH|1⟩ =', H @ H @ ket_1, '= |1⟩ (constructive at |1⟩)')
